title: SmartBuy: Global Phone Prices & Reviews by Country

data.description: Currently-available smartphone prices per country and review scores per model per brand. Updated monthly. Sources: GSMArena (expert + user scores, opinion count, availability status, launch year) × Kimovil (retail prices across 50+ countries).
data.name: phones

fields.name: availability
fields.title: Availability status from GSMArena (Available / Discontinued / etc.)

fields.name: date_launched
fields.title: Year the phone was announced (from GSMArena specs)

fields.name: gsmarena_score
fields.title: Expert review score 0-100 from GSMArena (empty if unreviewed)

fields.name: user_rating
fields.title: Crowd user rating out of 10 from GSMArena

fields.name: num_opinions
fields.title: Number of user opinions/votes behind user_rating

fields.name: country
fields.title: Country where the retail price was scraped
